sourceMovie.title: Safe
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Safe (2012) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Payback
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Safe clicked for you, Payback (1999) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Safe?
faq.answer: Try Payback, Shaft, Léon: The Professional—each shares DNA with Safe while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Safe?
faq.answer: Safe (2012) is best described as Action, Crime, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Safe worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
